titleStmt.title: SII 26.350: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 350. (A.R. No. 331 of 1909.) KŪVAM, TIRUVALLORE TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

summary.p: South wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the same shrine.

This inscription records a gift of a śandhi lamp to the temple of the god Tiruviṟkōlamuḍaiyār of Kūvam alias Tiyāgasamudranallūr by Birāma Āṇḍavaṉ of the same place. The gift was received by a number of Śivabrāhmaṇas (names given) having right of worship in the temple, who had agreed to burn the sandhi lamp in the temple accordingly, from the month of Tai of the year quoted.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tribhuvanaccakravattikaḷ śrīvijayakaṇṭakopālatevarkku yāṇṭu 2 10 4 kūvamāṉa tiyākacamu
ttiranallūr Āḷuṭaiyār tiruviṟkolamuṭaiyārkku Ivvūril Irukkum pirāma Āṇṭavaṉ yika ko
yiṟ kāṇi Uṭaiya gautamaṉ Aracampiḷḷaiyum gautamaṉ poṉṉampalapaṭṭaṉum gautama
ṉ tiruvallamuṭaiyāṉ tiruvallamuṭaiyāṉ vākāḷuṭaiyāṉum tampimārum kāśyapa poṟko
yilnampi comaṉātatevaṉum Ivvaṉaivom Ivvāṇṭait taimmātamutal Oru cantiviḷakku muṭṭāmal
Erippatāka Upaiyaṅ kaikkoṇṭom Ivvaṉaivom Ippaṭikku gautamaṉ Aracampiḷḷaisya Ippaṭi
kku gautamaṉ poṉṉampala bhaṭṭasya Ippaṭikku gautamaṉ Ulakāḷa Uṭaiyār bhaṭṭasya ..
Ippaṭikku kāśyapaṉ poṟkoyilnampi comaṉāta bhaṭṭasya Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ kuṟumuṭi vāraṇapiramārāyar tiruppiccarār ṉāyiṉāṉ eḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 26.350 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
